text: Characterize cohort A's TTR/hereditary ATTR amyloidosis cohort: patient count, most frequent diagnoses, and whether the expected cardiac vs. neuropathic phenotype is present among amyloidosis (ICD E85.x) patients.

Among the 189 amyloidosis (E85.x) patients, what fraction carry cardiac-phenotype markers (I43/I50/I51.7/amyloid cardiomyopathy) vs neuropathic markers (E85.1/G62.9/G99.0 peripheral neuropathy), and how much overlap (mixed phenotype) exists?

Could diabetes/hyperglycemia confound the neuropathic phenotype signal in the E85.x cohort — i.e., do neuropathy-coded patients also have elevated glucose / diabetes diagnoses that offer an alternative explanation for peripheral neuropathy?
